name: CastCrew
description: Adds a Cast & Crew module to the Jellyfin sidebar for browsing actors, directors, producers, and other crew members.
overview: Browse actors, directors, and producers in a dedicated Cast & Crew page within Jellyfin Web.

versions.changelog: Fix assembly version compatibility: compile against baseline SDK for all 10.11.x servers.
Fix assembly version compatibility: compile against baseline SDK for all 10.10.x servers.
